# Pull Request Template

## 📋 Description
Please include a summary of the changes and related context.

## 🎯 Type of Change
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 🔄 Refactoring
- [ ] 🔒 Security improvement
- [ ] 📚 Assessment or quiz updates
- [ ] 🔧 Automation improvements

## 🔍 How Has This Been Tested?
Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README, guides, etc.)
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new warnings
- [ ] I have tested this thoroughly (locally or in staging)
- [ ] No unnecessary files are included (no IDE files, secrets, etc.)

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots for documentation or UI changes.

## 🔗 Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)

## 📝 Additional Notes
Add any additional context here.

---

**Thank you for contributing to AWS Cloud Security Lab!** 🚀
